PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?building ?buildingLabel ?height WHERE {
  ?building wdt:P31 wd:Q4117189 .
  ?building wdt:P577 ?completionDate .
  ?building wdt:P2048 ?height .
  ?building rdfs:label ?buildingLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?buildingLabel) = "en")
  .
  FILTER(?completionDate >= "1901-01-01T00:00:00Z" ^^ xsd:dateTime)
  .
  FILTER(?completionDate <= "2000-12-31T23:59:59Z" ^^ xsd:dateTime)
  .
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    ?building wdt:P582 ?demiseDate
  }
  .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?height)
LIMIT 4
